extractedPrompt:
Act as a productivity coach for entrepreneurs. Write a 10-minute YouTube script about morning routines that increase focus. Target busy business owners aged 25 to 40. Structure: Hook (30 seconds), three main tips (3 minutes each), recap (1 minute). Use a conversational tone with personal anecdotes. 

[Optional Meta-Prompt for refinement]: Analyze this prompt and suggest five specific improvements to make it more effective.
originalText: How to Write Perfect AI Prompts in 2025 (Complete Guide)
